mission: Continue ASCReview long-run build without reviewing the dissertation.

files.summary: Run plan with timebox, continuation source, structured cycles, and non-goals.
Structured ledger for four completed LibraryBuilder-Distiller, AdversarialAuditor, Arbiter-Integrator cycles.
Expanded source index from 17 to 32 sources with reporting guidelines, journal guidance, bioinformatics methods, and optional cancer-genomics seed metadata.

files.summary: Improved introduction, methodology, results, discussion, and figure/legend patterns and failure modes.

files.summary: Improved all 9 skills with stronger patterns, uncertainty handling, and provenance expectations.

next_actions: Run final validation after this snapshot.
